title: Smart Hospital Management System — Landing Page & Role-Based Login

requirements.text: Create a responsive Landing Page with a medical-blue, clean-white, and soft-gray visual theme. The page must feel trustworthy and tech-forward, with consistent typography, spacing, and color usage across all sections.

quotes: The design should be clean, trustworthy, and tech-forward (think medical blues, clean whites, and soft grays)

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette consistently uses medical blues, white backgrounds, and soft gray accents
Page is fully responsive on mobile (320px+) and desktop (1280px+)
Typography is clean and professional throughout

requirements.text: Implement a Hero Section on the Landing Page with: (1) a strong headline 'Next-Generation Healthcare Management', (2) a subheadline emphasizing speed, AI-driven scheduling, and real-time emergency routing, (3) a primary CTA button 'Book an Appointment', and (4) a visually distinct red secondary CTA button labeled 'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital'.

quotes: Two primary Call-to-Action (CTA) buttons: "Book an Appointment" (Primary) and a highly visible, red "EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital" (Secondary).

acceptanceCriteria: Headline 'Next-Generation Healthcare Management' is prominently displayed
Subheadline references speed, AI-driven scheduling, and real-time emergency routing
'Book an Appointment' button is styled as the primary action
'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital' button is red and visually prominent
Both buttons are clearly visible on mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Implement a Key Features Section on the Landing Page that visually highlights four core technical pillars as cards or feature blocks: (1) Lightning-Fast Records — instant patient history retrieval; (2) AI-Powered Scheduling — smart overbooking prevention and zero wait times using predictive ML; (3) Real-Time Emergency Routing — location-based immediate hospital matching; (4) Flawless Resource Management — conflict-free bed allocation and doctor scheduling.

quotes: Key Features Section (Crucial for our project): Visually highlight our four core technical pillars

acceptanceCriteria: All four feature pillars are displayed with distinct icons or visual indicators
Each pillar card includes a title and descriptive text matching the specified content
Section layout adapts gracefully from single-column on mobile to multi-column on desktop

requirements.text: Implement a Footer on the Landing Page with standard navigation links (e.g., Home, Features, Contact), contact information, and a clearly labeled link to the Login portal.

quotes: Footer: Standard links, contact info, and a link to the Login portal.

acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains navigation links including Home, Features, and Contact
Contact information (e.g., email or phone placeholder) is present
A 'Login' link in the footer navigates to the Login page
Footer is responsive and stacks gracefully on mobile

requirements.text: Create a Role-Based Login Page with a centered, minimalist design. Include a role selection toggle or tab bar at the top allowing the user to select one of three roles: Patient, Doctor, or Admin. Below the role selector, render a login form with Email and Password input fields and a Submit button. The active role tab must be visually highlighted.

quotes: Role Selection Toggle/Tabs: Users must be able to select their role before logging in. The roles are: Patient, Doctor, and Admin.
Form Fields: Standard Email and Password fields.
Styling: Keep it centered, minimalist, and easy to read.

acceptanceCriteria: Three role tabs (Patient, Doctor, Admin) are displayed and selectable
Active role tab is visually distinguished from inactive tabs
Email and Password fields are present and labeled
Submit/Login button is clearly visible
Layout is centered on all screen sizes
Form is accessible with proper labels and input types

requirements.text: Set up client-side routing so that the root path '/' renders the Landing Page and '/login' renders the Role-Based Login Page. Navigation between the two pages must work via the CTA buttons and footer link on the Landing Page.

quotes: a link to the Login portal

acceptanceCriteria: '/' route renders the Landing Page
'/login' route renders the Login Page
Clicking the footer Login link navigates to '/login'
Clicking 'Book an Appointment' navigates to '/login' pre-selecting the Patient role (or scrolls to a relevant section)
Browser back/forward navigation works correctly

requirements.text: Stub a minimal Motoko backend actor that exposes a basic health-check or placeholder query so the frontend has a backend canister to bind to. No persistent state or ML logic is required at this stage.

quotes: Smart Hospital Management System that combines advanced Database Management (RDBMS/ACID), Data Structures (Priority Queues/Hashing), and Machine Learning (Logistic Regression)

acceptanceCriteria: backend/main.mo compiles without errors
Actor exposes at least one query function (e.g., ping : () -> async Text)

requirements.text: Generate a hero background image for the Landing Page: a clean, modern hospital/medical abstract with soft blue gradients, light geometric patterns, and white space — suitable as a full-width hero section background.

quotes: clean, trustworthy, and tech-forward (think medical blues, clean whites, and soft grays)

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section uses the generated image as a background or decorative visual
Image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image renders crisply on both mobile and desktop

constraints: Do not use blue & purple color combinations — stick to medical blues, clean whites, and soft grays as specified
All frontend paths in frontend/src/hooks/ and frontend/src/components/ui are read-only and must not be modified
All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Actual ML/Logistic Regression implementation in the backend
Real database integration (RDBMS/ACID) at this stage
Priority Queue or Hashing data structure implementation
Real authentication or Internet Identity integration
Emergency hospital geolocation or map integration
Patient/Doctor/Admin dashboard screens beyond the login page

required: Abstract medical hero background with soft blue gradient, subtle light-ray and geometric grid overlay, clean white space, modern tech-forward aesthetic (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
